auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email to receive password reset instructions
auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If the account exists, password reset instructions have been sent to

auth.accountDisabled: Account has been disabled. Please contact an administrator.
auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase letter
auth.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least 1 lowercase letter
auth.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least 1 number
auth.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least 1 special character
company.selectDesc: You have multiple companies. Please select one to continue.
sessions.title: Active Sessions
2fa.step1: Step 1: Scan QR code with your authenticator app

2fa.step2: Step 2: Enter the verification code from the app
2fa.backupCodes: Backup codes (save these, each code can only be used once):
2fa.enabledDesc: Your account is now protected by two-factor authentication.
2fa.verifyDesc: Enter code from your authenticator app
